basics.name: Rohit Anand
basics.label: Data Analyst at S&P Global | MBA Business Analytics
basics.subLabel: SQL • Power BI • Advanced Excel | Ex-Pegasystems & Paytm
basics.summary: I'm a Business Analytics MBA who recently joined S&P Global as a Data Analyst, working on investor transaction data validation and financial intelligence reporting for institutional clients. Before this, I worked across three analytics environments that had almost nothing in common. At Pegasystems, I built a standardized HR metric dictionary with 15+ global stakeholders across regions, then built an AI agent on top of it so teams could query people metrics without waiting on anyone. At Paytm Ads, I rebuilt the ad performance reporting layer and cut reporting effort by 35%. At Innodatatics, I developed ARIMA + LSTM forecasting models at ~95% accuracy and optimized 50+ delivery routes using Dijkstra's algorithm — 12.7% cost reduction. Three roles, three industries, same problem — data that existed but couldn't be used yet — whether that's through a Power BI dashboard, a SQL pipeline, or an Advanced Excel model depending on what the problem actually needs.

certifications: Third Bridge - Client Service Delivery Job Simulation
BCG - Introduction to Strategy Consulting Job Simulation
Marketing Analytics in Action: Drive Growth and Communication with Data Insights

bullets: Extracting investor transaction datasets via SQL and Excel, validating and reconciling records against external sources, and flagging data quality issues across a multi-stage financial reporting pipeline.
Evaluated 750+ prompt-response pairs generated by multiple frontier LLMs against an 8-dimension quality rubric covering accuracy, relevance, coherence, and safety.
Delivered structured written feedback to model training teams, directly informing iterative improvements to response quality.
Built a standardized HR metric dictionary in collaboration with 20+ global stakeholders, bringing consistency to how key people metrics were defined and tracked across regions.
Built an AI agent on top of the metric dictionary to automate routine People Analytics queries.
Reviewed 70+ Power BI dashboards to identify usage gaps and shared optimization recommendations with leadership.
Documented data findings and analytical insights in structured reports for leadership and cross-functional stakeholders.
Coordinated with global teams across time zones to align on project milestones and deliverables.

Reduced manual reporting effort by 35% by automating performance reporting across 5 dedicated Google Sheets and Advanced Excel dashboards, with SQL-queried campaign datasets tracking 200+ advertising campaigns.
Enabled weekly campaign performance monitoring for 15+ managers by visualizing advertising KPIs — ROAS, CPM — in Power BI, using pre-processed Excel data as the reporting layer.
Presented campaign performance insights and reporting updates directly to leadership, translating dashboard findings into actionable recommendations for the Ads vertical.
Built ARIMA and LSTM forecasting models achieving ~95% accuracy in cost predictions, used directly for strategic planning.
Optimized transportation routes across 50+ routes using Dijkstra's algorithm, cutting costs by 12.7%.
Produced BRD and FRD documentation based on client requirements, iterating on scope and approach against real infrastructure constraints.

education.degree: Bachelor of Commerce - BCom(Hons.), Financial Market
